features.name: Chat
features.description: Real-time chat via WebSocket gateway protocol with streaming responses

features.name: Pulse Cards
features.description: Proactive notification cards grouped by category with swipe-to-dismiss, card stacks, and agent badges

features.name: Pulse Card Expansion
features.description: Tap-to-expand cards with full markdown reports. Report cards carry an expanded_body field and optional action buttons. The app renders a detail sheet with the complete content.

features.name: Calendar
features.description: Calendar tab with Month and Agenda views. Renders events the agent posts to the calendar API. Read-only display — the agent is the source of truth.

features.name: Web Apps
features.description: Agent-generated standalone HTML apps served in WKWebView, listed with pull-to-refresh and frequency sorting

features.name: Skills Display
features.description: View and manage agent skills from OpenPot. Reads skill list via gateway WebSocket, displays installed and bundled skills with status and requirements. Accessible within the Agents tab (no longer a standalone tab).

features.name: SSH Terminal
features.description: In-app SSH terminal via SwiftTerm with ed25519 keypair authentication

features.name: Settings
features.description: App settings accessible via the gear icon in the agent dock. Includes gateway configuration, connection management, and appearance options.
